hero.subtitle: Some days, just getting started is enough. Magic Snooze meets you where you are, then grows with you at your own pace.

safe.title: Designed To Feel Safe
safe.subtitle: The most important things are on by default. These choices reduce pressure from day one and keep your experience calm.

items.title: Notifications OFF
items.desc: Enable only the reminders that genuinely help.

items.title: Language auto-detected
items.desc: Catalan, English, Spanish, or Russian from first launch.

items.title: Offline and private
items.desc: No account, no cloud, no tracking. Your data stays local.

items.title: Auto day/night mode
items.desc: Switches automatically by default, or set it manually to match your preference.

problem.title: When productivity feels like punishment, starting gets harder
problem.subtitle: If one missed day feels like failure, the system is the problem, not you. Momentum should bend, not break. Support should reduce pressure, not raise it. Your pace can change and still be valid.

cards.title: Miss one day
cards.subtitle: All-or-nothing logic kills momentum
cards.desc: Traditional streak systems often frame one missed day as total failure, making restart emotionally expensive.

cards.title: Too much noise
cards.subtitle: Rigid schedules can become anxiety loops
cards.desc: Constant reminders and aggressive planning can overwhelm attention instead of helping focus.

cards.title: Mental overload
cards.subtitle: Thoughts need a safe landing place
cards.desc: When everything stays in your head, tasks and ideas become friction. You need quick capture, not more pressure.

cards.title: Real life happens
cards.subtitle: People move through seasons
cards.desc: Burnout, recovery, parenting, and hard weeks require flexibility. Static systems usually confuse flexibility with failure.

solution.title: A small, kind structure you can grow into
solution.subtitle: Magic Snooze meets you where you are, then helps you continue from there.

steps.title: Start with one soft routine
steps.desc: Create morning or evening routines with steps you can actually keep, even on low-energy days.

steps.title: Add simple tasks
steps.desc: Offload what's in your head, choose one next action, and reduce mental noise.

steps.title: Capture thoughts in Notes
steps.desc: Text, photos, and voice notes give your ideas a safe place to land.

steps.title: Rest, then return
steps.desc: Use Rest Day when needed, celebrate tiny wins, and continue tomorrow without guilt.

features.title: Everything you need, nothing you don't
features.subtitle: Tools designed for how your brain works, not against it.

sections.title: Protection from guilt spirals
sections.desc: Difficult days do not erase your progress. The app is built to keep your confidence intact.

items.title: Tiny Victories
items.desc: Eight tiny celebrations with confetti reinforce momentum, even on low-energy days.

items.title: Rest Days
items.desc: Pause without penalty, keep your streak, and return when your energy comes back.

items.title: Weekly Freeze
items.desc: One missed day each week can be automatically absorbed as a safety cushion.

sections.title: Soft structure for daily life
sections.desc: You can restart in seconds. No overload, no giant setup, no punishment mechanics.

items.title: Custom Routines
items.desc: Build morning and evening stacks that reset automatically at midnight.

items.title: Tasks Without Overload
items.desc: Add only what matters today and complete what you can without guilt.

items.title: Gentle Reminders
items.desc: Optional notifications help you return softly instead of forcing urgency.

sections.title: Capture thoughts before they vanish
sections.desc: Keep ideas, voice snippets, and visual notes in one place to reduce mental load.

items.title: Text Notes
items.desc: Write fast thoughts, reminders, and plans in a clean editor.

items.title: Voice Clips
items.desc: Record when typing is too much, then revisit when you are ready.

items.title: Photo Attachments
items.desc: Attach visual references so details are not lost later.

sections.title: Progress that feels safe
sections.desc: Stats are framed around consistency and wins, not punishment and shame.

items.title: Positive Stats
items.desc: See completion trends that emphasize what worked for you.

items.title: Victory Garden
items.desc: Visual growth turns tiny wins into something tangible and motivating.

items.title: Smart Streaks
items.desc: Track current and best streak with built-in safety nets.

who.title: Who It's For
who.subtitle: Different lives, same need: a calmer relationship with structure.

items.title: Neurodivergent minds
items.desc: You have ADHD or a different cognitive rhythm, and classic productivity apps never really fit.

items.title: Rebuilding after a hard season
items.desc: You need a gentle way back into routine without feeling punished for every interruption.

items.title: Parents supporting a child
items.desc: You're helping a child build rhythm without pressure, fear, or shame.

items.title: Anxiety around productivity
items.desc: You want routines that lower pressure and make starting easier instead of heavier.

items.title: Privacy-first users
items.desc: You want local-first tools that keep your data on your device.

items.a: Yes, Magic Snooze is 100% free and open source. There are no ads, no subscriptions, and no hidden fees.

items.q: Is my data safe? Who can see it?
items.a: Your data is completely safe because it never leaves your device. Magic Snooze is an offline-first app with no cloud syncing and no accounts.

items.q: Do I need to have ADHD to use the app?
items.a: Not at all! While it's designed to be ADHD-friendly, anyone who wants a gentler, guilt-free approach to productivity will find it helpful.

items.q: What's the difference between a Rest Day and Weekly Freeze?
items.a: A Rest Day is something you actively choose when you need a break. A Weekly Freeze is an automatic safety net that absorbs one missed day per week without breaking your streak.

items.q: Do I need internet to use Magic Snooze?
items.a: No. Magic Snooze works completely offline. You don't need an internet connection to use any of its features.
Currently, it supports Catalan, English, Spanish, and Russian. The app will automatically detect your device's language on first launch or set it in English if your language is not supported.

items.q: Why does the app ask for microphone or photo access?
items.a: These permissions are only requested if you choose to use the voice notes or photo attachment features. Your recordings and photos stay strictly on your device.

items.q: Can I contribute to the project?
items.a: Yes! Magic Snooze is open source. You can find my repository on GitHub and contribute code, translations, or bug reports.

cta.title: Start small. Try again tomorrow.
cta.subtitle: Soft routines, simple tasks, and notes that help you restart gently.

footer.tagline: Routines, tasks and notes for a gentler relationship with yourself.
